mapper.insert: INSERT INTO slip_detail ( slip_id, code, name, price, tax_price, credit, media_name, release_date, note ) VALUES ( #{slipId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{price}, #{taxPrice}, #{credit}, #{mediaName}, #{releaseDate}, #{note} )
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.slip_id, d.code, d.name, d.price, d.tax_price, d.credit, d.media_name, d.release_date, d.note, d.returned, d.returned_date FROM slip_detail d JOIN slip s ON d.slip_id = s.id WHERE s.slip_no = #{slipNo} ORDER BY d.id

SELECT s.id AS slip_id, s.slip_no, s.staff_name, s.loan_date, s.return_date, d.id, d.code, d.name, d.price, d.tax_price, d.credit, d.media_name, d.release_date, d.note, d.returned FROM slip s JOIN slip_detail d ON s.id = d.slip_id WHERE s.slip_no = #{slipNo} ORDER BY d.id

SELECT s.id AS slip_id, s.slip_no, s.staff_name, s.loan_date, s.return_date, d.id, d.code, d.name, d.price, d.tax_price, d.credit, d.media_name, d.release_date, d.note, d.returned FROM slip s JOIN slip_detail d ON s.id = d.slip_id WHERE d.code = #{code} ORDER BY s.slip_no, d.id
mapper.update: UPDATE slip_detail SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, tax_price = #{taxPrice}, credit = #{credit}, media_name = #{mediaName}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
